sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this sports title

special_mechanics.name: Football Player Control
special_mechanics.description: Game allows user-controlled player movement and actions including running, passing, catching, and blocking in a sports simulation context

special_mechanics.name: Punt Block Control
special_mechanics.description: 1993 SNES/Genesis versions added ability to control a player to attempt a punt block

special_mechanics.name: Weather System
special_mechanics.description: Three weather conditions (sunny, rain, snow) can occur randomly in Season mode, potentially affecting gameplay physics

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. This is a sports simulation (American football) rather than a platformer or action game with detailed documented movement physics. No specific jump heights, gravity values, acceleration rates, or sub-pixel systems are documented in available sources. Movement mechanics are implicit in gameplay rather than explicitly documented.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Tecmo Super Bowl (gameplay and feature descriptions)
